description: The global sum of all ecosystems on Earth — the zone of life comprising all living organisms and their interactions with the Atmosphere, Lithosphere, and Hydrosphere.

contents.name: estimatedSpeciesCount
contents.description: Estimated total number of species on Earth (described and undescribed).

contents.name: totalBiomassPgC
contents.description: Total estimated biomass of life on Earth in petagrams of carbon.

contents.name: globalNPP_PgCperYear
contents.description: Annual global net primary productivity — the net carbon fixed by photosynthesis — in petagrams of carbon per year.

contents.name: isPartOf
contents.description: The Biosphere is part of Earth.

contents.name: interactsWith
contents.description: The Biosphere interacts with the Atmosphere through gas exchange, the Hydrosphere through the water cycle, and the Lithosphere through soil formation and nutrient cycling.

description: A large area dominated by trees and understory vegetation. Forests cover approximately 31% of Earth's land area and are critical carbon sinks and biodiversity hotspots.

contents.name: name
contents.description: Name or identifier of this forest or forest region.

contents.name: forestType
contents.description: The biome type of this forest.

contents.name: area_km2
contents.description: Total area of this forest in square kilometres.

contents.name: canopyCoverPercentage
contents.description: Current canopy cover percentage of this forest.

contents.name: carbonStockPgC
contents.description: Current above-ground carbon stock stored in this forest in petagrams of carbon.

description: An area where the vegetation is dominated by grasses and other non-woody plants. Grasslands cover approximately 40% of Earth's land surface and are vital for food production and carbon storage.

contents.name: name
contents.description: Name or identifier of this grassland region.

contents.name: grasslandType
contents.description: The type of grassland biome.

contents.name: area_km2
contents.description: Total area of this grassland in square kilometres.

contents.name: soilCarbonPgC
contents.description: Current soil carbon stock of this grassland in petagrams of carbon.

description: A barren landscape that receives less than 250 mm of precipitation per year. Deserts cover approximately 33% of Earth's land surface and include hot, cold, and coastal varieties.

contents.name: name
contents.description: Name of this desert.

contents.name: desertType
contents.description: The type of desert.

contents.name: area_km2
contents.description: Total area of this desert in square kilometres.

contents.name: annualPrecipitationMm
contents.description: Annual precipitation of this desert in millimetres.

description: A large landform rising steeply above its surroundings, typically above 600 m. Mountains cover approximately 24% of Earth's land surface and are critical water towers and biodiversity refugia.

contents.name: name
contents.description: Name of this mountain.

contents.name: elevationM
contents.description: Peak elevation of this mountain above sea level in metres.

contents.name: rangeOrMassif
contents.description: The mountain range or massif this mountain belongs to.

contents.name: isLocatedIn
contents.description: A mountain may be located within or on the boundary of the Lithosphere and Biosphere.
